name: Euripides
title: Hierophant

abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Future Sight
abilities.text: During the start phase, this model may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, it may draw two cards.

abilities.name: The Ice Remembers
abilities.text: Once per activation. Enemy models with Numb tokens suffer -1 Skl when targeting allies within 6" of this model.

actions.name: Aetheric Gaze
actions.effects: Enemy models within (x)1" of the target are dealt 1 damage.

triggers.name: Frozen Trophy
triggers.text: Once per activation. Target gains a Frozen Solid token.

triggers.name: Revelation
triggers.text: This model gains an Insight token.

actions.name: Crowned in Frost
actions.effects: Enemy models within (x)4" of the target must pass a TN 14 Df duel or gain a Numb token and be dealt 2 damage.

triggers.name: Crack the Marrow
triggers.text: This model declares an attack action; if the attack kills a model, make a Scheme marker within 1" of this model.

triggers.name: Crushing Epoch
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (x) of this action by +2".

actions.name: Shiver the World
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Choose two allies within range, not chosen by this action this activation.
actions.effects: Apply one of the following effects to each of the chosen models:

extraction_notes: Shiver the World effects are listed as separate sub-items: 'Rim with Frost: The chosen model heals 2.', 'Scars of Power: The chosen model gains an Insight token.', 'Frozen Steps: Move the chosen model up to 4".' These appear to be part of the action's effects text, not separate actions or triggers.
